title: Key
Projects
FeaturedWork.desc: My approach is built on a deep understanding of business, strategy, and real results. I help companies identify growth opportunities, build strong positioning, and create solutions that work not for visual appeal alone, but for profit and sustainable development.

title: Strategy Approach
Export
about.subtitle: I work with the textile business where marketing stops being just a presentation and starts influencing numbers, contracts, and responsibility. I am not a theorist or a “reach-focused marketer” — I understand production, cost structure, and export realities. My work begins with business diagnostics and ends with revenue growth, not reports based on likes.
description: For more than 10 years, I have been developing textile companies and brands, building marketing strategies aligned with real business goals, and supporting product exports. I have participated in negotiations with partners from Europe, the USA, Turkey, and Asia, worked with factories entering foreign markets and international exhibitions, which is why I speak the language of numbers, processes, and contracts.

Since 2019, I have been leading World Textile Marketing Agency — an agency specializing exclusively in the light industry sector. We build marketing as a system: positioning, sales, and expansion into new markets, without “creativity for the sake of creativity,” but with a focus on sustainable and predictable business growth.

content.title: Audit
content.description: I conduct a deep analysis of business, marketing, and sales. I identify loss points, systemic mistakes, and hidden growth opportunities. An audit provides a clear understanding of what exactly prevents a business from earning more.
content.fullDescription: I analyze marketing, sales, and strategy to clearly identify where the business is losing money and what prevents revenue growth.

content.title: Market Analysis
content.description: I study the market, competitors, and customer behavior. I identify real demand, pricing corridors, and differentiation points. Market analysis is the foundation for strong decisions and sustainable growth.
content.fullDescription: Market analysis is the foundation of all strategic decisions. I study demand, competitors, and customer decision logic so that business decisions are based on facts, not assumptions.

content.title: Product Promotion
content.description: I build promotion strategies focused on revenue, not just reach. I create positioning, messaging, and channels that attract real clients. Marketing should be a sales tool, not just an expense.
content.fullDescription: Product promotion is not just advertising for reach. I build marketing that attracts clients and directly impacts business revenue.
features: Focus on Actions That Generate Revenue

content.title: Product Export
content.description: I help businesses prepare for entering international markets. I analyze countries, requirements, risks, and entry points. Export is a system, not a random deal.
content.fullDescription: Product export is a system, not a one-time deal. I help prepare businesses to enter foreign markets by reducing risks and increasing the chances of sustainable contracts.
features: Analysis of Countries and Sales Markets

content.title: Negotiations and Deal Support
content.description: I support negotiations with partners and buyers. I help build a strong position, clear argumentation, and protect business interests. The result is transparent terms and long-term contracts.
content.fullDescription: Negotiations are the point where the outcome of a deal is decided. I support businesses at key stages of communication with partners, helping preserve position, terms, and results.
features: Control of Terms and Agreement Fixation

content.title: Trainings and Seminars
content.description: I conduct practical trainings and seminars for business owners, sales and marketing departments, as well as specialists in the textile industry. We analyze real business cases, common mistakes, growth tools, and modern approaches in B2B sales. The training is focused not on theory, but on practical solutions that can be implemented immediately.
content.fullDescription: Trainings and seminars are tools for team development and business growth. I conduct practical training for managers, sales departments, marketing teams, and specialists from different fields so employees make strong decisions and work for results, not just process.

title_3: I diagnose the problem and offer treatment that delivers results.

title: Frequently
Asked Questions
questions.desc: I live marketing because it is about decisions, responsibility, and growth. Everything else is secondary.

questionsData.question: What makes you different from a regular marketing agency?
questionsData.answer: I do not sell universal solutions. I have been working specifically with the textile industry for 10 years and understand production, cost structure, export, and the logic of B2B sales. For me, marketing is a business growth tool, not just attractive packaging.

questionsData.question: What kind of textile companies do you work with?
questionsData.answer: I work with factories and brands in the light industry: yarn, knitted fabric, and ready-made garments. Priority is given to companies that think strategically and focus on growth, export, and long-term partnerships.

questionsData.question: Do you handle sales or only marketing?
questionsData.answer: I work at the intersection of marketing and sales. My task is to build a system that helps attract partners, strengthen trust, and support real negotiations—not just increase reach and likes.

questionsData.question: Can we work together if the company does not have a strong brand?
questionsData.answer: Yes. In most cases, clients come to me exactly with this challenge. I help build positioning from scratch: from meaning and strategy to materials, communication, and market entry.

questionsData.question: Do you work with international markets?
questionsData.answer: Yes. I have experience working with companies focused on the CIS, Europe, the USA, and Turkey. I help adapt marketing and communication to the requirements of international partners and buyers.
